stories.definitionOfDone: • Architecture Design: Design of the insulin delivery module to ensure timely and accurate delivery of insulin.
stories.description: The system shall deliver insulin when required.
stories.testCases:
Test: deliver insulin when required.
Expected: System performs deliver insulin when required. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Deliver Insulin When Required

stories.definitionOfDone: • Database Schema Design: Database schema design for storing user data, including blood sugar levels and basal insulin rates. • Unit Tests: Unit tests for insulin dosage calculation algorithm to ensure accuracy.
stories.description: The system shall calculate the correct amount of insulin to be delivered based on the current level of blood sugar.
stories.testCases:
Test: calculate the correct amount of insulin to be delivered based on the current level of blood sugar.
Expected: System performs calculate the correct amount of insulin to be delivered based on the current level of blood sugar. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Calculate Correct Amount Of Insulin

stories.definitionOfDone: • Architecture Design: Design of the insulin dosing module to account for time elapsed since last injection. • Unit Tests: Unit tests for insulin dosing algorithm to ensure accuracy.
stories.description: The system shall adjust the dose of insulin according to the time since the last insulin injection.
stories.testCases:
Test: adjust the dose of insulin according to the time since the last insulin injection.
Expected: System performs adjust the dose of insulin according to the time since the last insulin injection. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Adjust Dose Of Insulin According
